channel.title: East Meets West - Private Feed
channel.description: Auto-generated private feed for East Meets West
channel.itunes:author: RT

item.title: European security, peace talks & the OSCE with Ambassador Dmitry Polyansky — RT East meets West with Olga and Tara
item.description: Olga and Tara sit down with Ambassador Dmitry Polyansky, Russia’s appointed permanent representative to the OSCE

item.title: Iran, Ukraine, Trump & Deep State with George Papadopoulos & Simona Mangiante — RT East meets West with Olga and Tara
item.description: Olga and Tara welcome former foreign policy adviser to Donald Trump, George Papadopoulos, and former legal adviser to the European Parliament, Simona Mangiante, to break down the most recent whirlwind of global diplomacy

item.title: Iran, Ukraine, Trump & Deep State with George Papadopoulos & Simona Mangiante — RT East meets West with Olga and Tara
item.description: Olga and Tara welcome former foreign policy adviser to Donald Trump, George Papadopoulos, and former legal adviser to the European Parliament, Simona Mangiante, to break down the most recent whirlwind of global diplomacy

item.title: European security, peace talks & the OSCE with Ambassador Dmitry Polyansky — RT East meets West with Olga and Tara
item.description: Olga and Tara sit down with Ambassador Dmitry Polyansky, Russia’s appointed permanent representative to the OSCE

item.title: Iran under fire, killing of Supreme Leader & Life near US bases with Elham Abedini — RT East meets West with Olga and Tara
item.description: Olga and Tara are joined by Iranian journalist and international relations expert Elham Abedini, reporting directly from Tehran after the strikes by Israel and the US that killed Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, among many others

item.title: Iran under fire, killing of Supreme Leader & Life near US bases with Elham Abedini — RT East meets West with Olga and Tara
item.description: Olga and Tara are joined by Iranian journalist and international relations expert Elham Abedini, reporting directly from Tehran after the strikes by Israel and the US that killed Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, among many others
